title: Ability to choose columns, adjust window size, sort by name in gantt view
excerpt:
Ability to choose columns: choose which columns are displayed in the Gantt view. 
Ability to adjust/resize the window. 
Ability to sort by name: sort tasks by name directly within the Gantt view.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)

Ability to choose columns: choose which columns are displayed in the Gantt view.

Ability to adjust/resize the window.

Ability to sort by name: sort tasks by name directly within the Gantt view.
